description: The Codispoti are a 'ndrina (organized crime clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in San Luca, Calabria, Italy. They are allied with the Nirta-Scalzone, Romeo, Libri, and De Stefano families. They have been involved in drug trafficking from South America to Italy and other European countries, and have served as mediators in the Reggio Calabria mafia war. The clan is considered a reference point for the 'Ndrangheta in Rome.
